description: DeepSeek chat interface — React UI with native textarea input
notes: Probe confirmed: TEXTAREA with placeholder='Message DeepSeek'. Target resolves cleanly via placeholder anchor.

prompt_input.description: Main chat textarea — placeholder confirmed: 'Message DeepSeek'

send_button.description: Send message button — div[role=button] with stable class ds-icon-button--sizing-container. No aria-label. Confirmed via DOM inspection.
send_button.notes: DeepSeek uses divs not buttons. All icon buttons have hashed prefix classes; --sizing-container is stable.

stop_button.description: Stop generation button — appears during streaming, disappears when done
stop_button.notes: Selector uncertain — needs calibration on first run with active generation

response_container.description: Last DeepSeek response message — confirmed selector: [class*='ds-markdown']
response_container.notes: First child is thinking preamble; last child or :last-of-type gives final answer

cloudflare_overlay.description: Cloudflare Turnstile bot-challenge overlay — present in DOM with display:none, activates on bot detection
cloudflare_overlay.notes: div#cf-overlay. Triggered by automation. Manual submit bypasses it. Real keyboard events via CDP may also bypass.
